description: Single EEG electrode (one of TP9, AF7, AF8, TP10 for Muse Athena). Reports per-band powers and signal quality.

contents.name: delta
contents.description: Delta band power (1-4 Hz), in microV^2.

contents.name: theta
contents.description: Theta band power (4-8 Hz), in microV^2.

contents.name: alpha
contents.description: Alpha band power (8-13 Hz), in microV^2.

contents.name: beta
contents.description: Beta band power (13-30 Hz), in microV^2.

contents.name: gamma
contents.description: Gamma band power (30-45 Hz), in microV^2.

contents.name: contactQuality
contents.description: Categorical derived from quality: >=0.8 good, >=0.5 weak, else none.
